stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What happens if the pilot presses the IDENT button?

options.a: The code 3264 is automatically transmitted to ATC, at regular 30-minute intervals.
options.b: A distinctive display of the aircraft's position is available to ATC for 15 to 30 seconds.
options.c: SSR Mode S information is available to ATC, for a period of 15 to 30 minutes.
options.d: The emergency code is automatically assigned to the aircraft's SSR Mode A.
